calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar Mar-12-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Carlos Jato for and with Carol Sperber.

The Court noted that the Petitioner has a Domestic Partnership Certificate, stated that Petitions to Establish Fact of Marriage are generally filed in order to get proof of marriage and that the standard form of order does not appear appropriate under these circumstances. The Court will sign an order confirming the domestic partnerhsip.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/ Nancy Bautista. Bailiff: Deputy J. Chen.
